UserComments.Comment: While 2 days ago i charged successfully withou any troubles from free Schuko socket,today i had these troubles:Visit @ April 10, 2026: An asshole saboteur was obstructing 2 of 3 parking bays reserved for (PH)EV charging by his van(diesel) & his trailer with a mobile shop,he also expelled me out of the 3rd parking bay reserved for EVs,he told,he payed for 2 places,but he was blocking all 3 places,he was rude & forced me to move to the neighboring parking lot,but even against his sabotage i charged successfully from free Schuko socket thanx to my 25m long extension cable, now I used its full length 1st time,so I advice to every1 to have @ least 25m long extension cable onboard, it proved to be necessary...  The saboteur's registry: KO880HP.
Visit @ April 08, 2026: Everything OK,charged successfully from free Schuko socket.

Mennekes: Payed,charging time max.3hrs, extra fees, if exceeded, restart charging every 3hrs. to avoid extra fees.May be blocked by ICE cars.Schuko: Free charging, no authentication, no time limit & if charging station is blocked,U can use extension cable.When I was charging here,whole parking lot was blocked:1 bay was in use by the e-van,which has here a reserved place,2 other parking bays was blocked by ICE cars(1 had Czech registry & the other had Slovak registry),thus I had to charge on road in front of them using extension cord, thus of course Schuko socket. Charging was successful, but very inconvenient, because as I could not normally dock my vehicle to charging station & I had to charge on road with emergency lights on & ready to depart if asked by cops or so,thus I could not go away from the vehicle to find a restaurant, toilet,or so,U will most probably experience the same problem here,as those ignorants r probably regular commuters from countries with least EV support,thus they will probably continue to block the charging station regularly & cops r probably very rare here,as they r obviously not afraid of fines for blocking a charging station by ICE cars...So if U r planning to charge here,have an extension cable onboard, at least 10m long.Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Schuko socket: Free of charge; Mennekes sockets authenthicated by RFID card,EVN tariff.

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station (AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: 3 parking places dedicated to EVs,but often blocked by ICE cars;on 1 of the places local municipal e-van has a priority;otherwise unlimited public access.

Connections.Comments: Free charging from this socket. No authentication needed.
EVN tariff, RFID card authentication. Max.3hrs.
A municipal van has reserved priority of charging here.
